title: CreateTableInput
description: CreateTableInput schema from Amazon DynamoDB API

TableName.description: The name of the table to create

KeySchema.description: Specifies the attributes that make up the primary key for the table. The attributes must also be defined in AttributeDefinitions.

AttributeDefinitions.description: An array of attributes that describe the key schema for the table and indexes

BillingMode.description: Controls how you are charged for read and write throughput

GlobalSecondaryIndexes.description: One or more global secondary indexes to be created on the table

LocalSecondaryIndexes.description: One or more local secondary indexes to be created on the table

Tags.description: Tags to associate with the table
